phone.title: Login or sign up
phone.subtitle: Enter your mobile number. We'll send a 6-digit OTP to verify it's you.
phone.label: Phone number
phone.terms: By continuing you agree to EaseCab's<break></break><terms>Terms</terms> & <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

perms.title: Allow a few permissions
perms.subtitle: EaseCab needs these to send duty alerts and keep your feed live. You can change them later in Profile.

location.title: Location
location.desc: Surface live duties near you and auto-fill your pickup city.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Ping you the moment a matching duty drops — even when the app is closed.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Let you share a duty with drivers already in your phonebook.

background.title: Background activity
background.desc: Keep alerts reliable without draining your battery.

done.title: You're all set!
done.trial: Welcome to EaseCab. Your 7-day free trial has started — full access to every duty. Verify your identity later to start posting.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again after an hour.
errors.invalidOtp: That code is incorrect. Please check and retry.
errors.codeExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and retry.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
